scripts.build:deps: npm run build --workspace @syncore/internal && npm run build --workspace @syncore/devtools-protocol && npm run build --workspace @syncore/schema && npm run build --workspace @syncore/core && npm run build --workspace @syncore/react && npm run build --workspace @syncore/svelte && npm run build --workspace @syncore/platform-web && npm run build --workspace @syncore/platform-node && npm run build --workspace @syncore/platform-expo && npm run build --workspace @syncore/next
scripts.test:contract: npm run build:deps && vitest run --config vitest.config.ts src/runtime-contract.test.ts src/plugin-contract.test.ts src/adapter-expo-contract.test.ts
scripts.test:surface: npm run build:deps && npm run snapshot:declarations && vitest run --config vitest.config.ts src/declaration-docs.test.ts src/surface-exports.test.ts src/surface-types.test.ts
scripts.test: npm run build:deps && npm run snapshot:declarations && vitest run --config vitest.config.ts
scripts.test:smoke:electron: npm run build --workspace syncore-example-electron && playwright test -c playwright.electron.config.ts
scripts.test:smoke: npm run test:smoke:web && npm run test:smoke:electron && npm run test:smoke:expo
